name: Setmore Online Appointment Scheduling API
what_it_does: Online appointment scheduling platform with REST API — enabling service businesses (salons, medical, tutoring, consultants) to manage bookings, staff schedules, services, and customers programmatically, with integrations for Google Calendar, Stripe payments, and Zoom video, and a REST API for appointment automation and third-party integrations.
use_cases: Creating appointments via Setmore API for automated booking from external systems
Retrieving staff availability via Setmore API for calendar integration
Managing customer data via Setmore API for CRM sync and booking automation
Listing services via Setmore API for website booking widget customization
Canceling appointments via Setmore API for automated booking management workflows
not_for: Enterprise scheduling with complex resource management (use ServiceNow or Salesforce Service Cloud)
Healthcare with strict HIPAA compliance (Setmore has limited HIPAA features)
Complex multi-location enterprise appointment management (use Mindbody for fitness/wellness scale)
best_when: A small service business (salon, tutor, consultant) needs simple, affordable online appointment booking — where Setmore provides scheduling automation with a REST API for custom integration at a competitive price.
avoid_when: You need enterprise-scale scheduling, strict HIPAA compliance, or complex resource management across many locations.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow for third-party apps. Refresh token for long-lived access. Access token via OAuth2. No API key option for public API. No fine-grained OAuth scopes. Webhooks for appointment events (create/update/cancel). Access token expires — must refresh using refresh token.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: 1 staff, unlimited appointments, basic features
pricing.paid_tiers: Pro $5/user/month (billed annually); Team $5/user/month (min 2 users); Growth add-ons
pricing.notes: US company (Portland, Oregon). Founded 2011. Backed by Paytm (Indian fintech). 25M+ appointments booked. Used by: salons, dental offices, tutors, consultants. Free plan is generous. Video meetings via Zoom, Google Meet, Teams. Payment via Stripe, Square, PayPal. Google Calendar, Outlook sync. Facebook/Instagram booking integration. Staff management. Class bookings (multiple attendees). Telehealth features. HIPAA features on enterprise plans. WordPress plugin. SMS reminders.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with OAuth2. Webhooks. GDPR/HIPAA. US-based. Free plan available. OAuth2 only (no API key option) — requires user authorization flow. Access token expires — must handle refresh.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Appointment reads idempotent by appointment ID. Staff reads idempotent. Appointment creation: check for conflicts/duplicates before creating. Cancellation idempotent by appointment ID.
known_agent_gotchas: OAuth2 only — no simple API key option; requires authorization code flow for every new integration
Access token expires — implement token refresh logic using refresh token
Free plan users cannot access API (API requires paid plan or specific plan tiers)
Backed by Paytm (India) — company direction tied to Paytm corporate strategy
Staff ID required for most appointment operations — list staff first to get IDs
No timezone management in API — all times in account's configured timezone

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, HIPAA (enterprise plan). OAuth2 auth. US data residency. Customer appointment data (PII — names, contact, health appointments) is sensitive. HIPAA features require enterprise plan and BAA. Paytm ownership adds corporate governance consideration. Access token expiry reduces long-term credential exposure.
